overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player traverses a covered ground-level arcade, ascends an outdoor staircase, and continues along an elevated walkway with views of the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial arcade with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade passing digital billboards and shop fronts

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a celebrity advertisement
continuous horizontal neon lighting along the right wall
large structural columns supporting the overhead structure
multiple illuminated advertisement displays on the left wall
small illuminated shop stall with digital signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial walkway at night, illuminated by vibrant pink and cyan neon lights. Digital billboards and advertisements line the walls, including a prominent celebrity billboard on the right. The player walks forward through the arcade-like space, passing concrete pillars and scattered litter on the tiled ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase transition between street level and upper walkway

events.description: begins ascending the staircase from ground level to upper walkway
reaches the top of the stairs and enters the upper enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs toward the upper level while passing a large red illuminated banner

entered.detail: concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
tall illuminated red advertisement banner with figure displayed

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and ascends a concrete staircase illuminated by red neon lighting from a large vertical banner. The environment transitions from the open arcade to a more enclosed stairwell, with metal railings visible on both sides. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into a corridor with blue flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated interior walkway with blue flooring

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered upper corridor with blue illuminated flooring

entered.detail: reflective blue flooring covering the walkway surface
smooth concrete wall surfaces lining the corridor
large digital displays mounted on the ceiling showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a long, enclosed elevated walkway characterized by distinctive blue floor tiles that reflect the overhead lighting. The corridor is flanked by concrete walls and pillars, with digital advertising screens visible on the ceiling. The space is empty of pedestrians, creating a quiet, atmospheric passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway opening to city skyline view

events.description: walkway opens to reveal exterior cityscape with palm trees and skyscrapers
ambient light increases as night sky becomes visible through the opening

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as the city view opens up on the left side

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible in the distance
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
transparent safety barrier along the open edge of the walkway
bright pink and cyan neon signage on the adjacent building facade

segments.scene_description: As the player progresses, the enclosed corridor opens up to reveal a stunning view of the Night City skyline. The right side remains covered with neon-lit building facades, while the left side opens to show palm trees and distant skyscrapers against the night sky. The blue floor continues, reflecting the mixed neon and ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace overlooking lower commercial level

events.description: slows and turns right toward stairway descending to lower level

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the walkway and looking down at the lower plaza level

entered.detail: building edge illuminated with continuous purple neon lighting
lower level commercial area visible below with various lighting
large horizontal advertisement screen displaying 'BOTTOMS UP' text

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the end of the elevated walkway, where the path turns right and descends toward a lower level. A prominent purple neon light strip runs along the building edge, and a large 'BOTTOMS UP' billboard becomes visible on the left. The camera looks down toward the lower plaza, revealing multiple levels of the urban structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit ground-level arcade up into an elevated walkway overlooking the sprawling Night City skyline. It begins by moving through a covered commercial walkway illuminated by vibrant pink and cyan neon lights and digital billboards, passing concrete pillars and scattered litter. As the camera approaches a red-lit vertical banner, it ascends a concrete staircase that transitions the environment from the open arcade into a quiet, enclosed corridor with reflective blue flooring. The scene then expands as the enclosed walkway opens up on the left to reveal palm trees and distant skyscrapers against the night sky, while the right side remains flanked by neon-lit facades. Finally, the path turns right and descends toward a lower plaza, passing a purple neon light strip and a large Bottoms Up billboard as the camera looks down upon the multi-leveled urban structure.
